name: @kcpatt27/memvid-mcp
description: MemVid MCP Server - AI Memory Bank Management with Enhanced Search

scripts.build: tsc && npm run copy-python && npm run copy-config
scripts.copy-python: node --input-type=module -e "import { copyFileSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'; mkdirSync('dist/lib', { recursive: true }); copyFileSync('src/lib/memvid-bridge.py', 'dist/lib/memvid-bridge.py');"
scripts.copy-config: node --input-type=module -e "import { copyFileSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'; mkdirSync('dist/config', { recursive: true }); copyFileSync('config/default.json', 'dist/config/default.json');"
scripts.test:security: node tests/security/bank-name.test.mjs && node tests/security/source-policy.test.mjs && node tests/security/path-probes.test.mjs && node tests/security/ssrf-probe.test.mjs

author: kcpatt27
